title: spec_binding_cleared event payload
$comment: Class: REQUIRES_SPEC_ID. Records the half-state REPAIR event 'a stale worktree: field was cleared from a spec the registry + git agree has no live worktree.' Distinct from spec_updated (which has no schema and is not appendable) and from worktree_destroyed (which is about a worktree, not a spec field). Emitted by caws worktree prune/repair for the unambiguous ghost-spec-binding (H4) and dormant closed/archived spec-binding (H3-closed/archived) classes authorized by WORKTREE-SPEC-AUTHORITY-CONTROL-PLANE-002. WORKTREE-REPAIR-EVENT-CONTRACT-001.

spec_id.description: The spec whose stale worktree: field was cleared. REQUIRES_SPEC_ID: clearing a binding always names a spec. (Mirrored on the event envelope as spec_id; included here so the payload is self-describing.)

cleared_worktree_name.description: The worktree name the spec's worktree: field referenced before it was cleared.

h_class.description: The §1.4 authorized class: ghost_spec_binding (H4 — registry + git both absent) or dormant_spec_binding (H3 on a closed/archived spec). The enum is closed so H3-active (ambiguous) can never be cleared without a doctrine update.

reason.description: Human-readable authority reason, e.g. 'registry and git both confirm no live worktree (H4 ghost spec binding)'.
